name: unify-base-components-with-lobe-ui
title: 统一基础组件到 Lobe UI
description: Inventory and plan the replacement of self-written/native base UI controls with Lobe UI while preserving project theme colors, button style, and sonner toast.
creator: ROYIANS
notes: Toast remains out of scope; keep sonner. Prefer Lobe UI defaults for base controls, but keep project theme colors and button style.
